Precondition: Right end effector is free; cup_1 is accessible.
Postcondition: cup_1 is grasped by the right end effector.

Precondition: cup_1 is grasped by the right end effector; table top is available for placement.
Postcondition: cup_1 is placed on the table; right end effector is free.

Precondition: Right end effector is free; box_2 front side is accessible.
Postcondition: box_2 has been pushed from the front.

Precondition: Both end effectors are free; box_1 left and right sides are accessible.
Postcondition: box_1 is grasped with dual-arm symmetric grasp.
